stem: In a right triangle, one of the non-right angles measures 30°. The length of the hypotenuse is 14. What is the length of the side opposite the 30° angle?
rationale: The correct answer is 7. In a 30-60-90 right triangle, the side opposite the 30° angle is half the length of the hypotenuse. So the side opposite the 30° angle has length 14/2 = 7.
